body:
The JWT verification accepts tokens with "alg": "none". When sending a forged JWT with algorithm "none" and no signature, the server authenticated the request as admin. Proved by accessing /api/Users/1 with the forged token resulting in 200 and user data.
Token: eyJ0eXAiOiAiSldUIiwgImFsZyI6ICJub25lIn0..
Response: 200 OK with user data.
